body_txt: Lack of pupils, and customary light reflection; iris shading goes from the usual radial to gradient; eyelids drop. Yep, this character is suffering from the "Empty Eyes" trope, a condition denoting that the character is dying, dead, distracted, shocked, traumatized , mind-controlled , broken, in a state of Tranquil Fury , completely insane, or some combination of the above. Due to the condition of shock causing the eyes to dilate, realistic live action will never have this unless the producers don't know better. Could be a way to show someone is so shocked they haven't blinked for a while, because the tears that accumulate would make the eyes more reflective and the pupils harder to see. Pushed for effect in Break the Cutie scenarios. Alternatively, when this trope appears in villains it is often used for The Sociopath or other characters similarly detached from their crimes. In which case the character will have these eyes as their default. This especially happens during a Wide Eyes and Shrunken Irises moment in which a character with light reflections would get this treatment upon seeing something Oh, Crap! inducing. Sister Trope of Prophet Eyes , and the two may coincide as repeated trauma could give someone a Disability Superpower . Subtrope of Reflectionless Useless Eyes . Compare Dull Eyes of Unhappiness , Thousand-Yard Stare , Mind-Control Eyes , Heroic BSoD and Angst Coma .
